title: polypodium fortuni
intro: Polypodium fortuni, also known as Polypodium leucotomos or Mexican scalycap, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, which can help protect the skin from sun damage and prevent certain diseases. The health benefits of Polypodium fortuni include reducing the risk of skin cancer, improving immune function, and exhibiting neuroprotective effects. Polypodium fortuni is often prepared as a supplement in capsule or powder form, or as a topical cream or serum for its medicinal and cosmetic benefits.
